sections.name: HOOK
sections.content:
You've been reading these emails for three weeks. Maybe you've bookmarked a page. Maybe you've talked to your partner. Maybe you've watched your child and thought, "I'm still not sure."

That's exactly where you're supposed to be.

---

### RECAP

Over the past 21 days, we've covered a lot of ground together:

- Why some children don't feel the signal, It's not training. It's neurology. Research shows many children with sensory differences have diminished body awareness — the "I need to go" signal doesn't arrive in time, or at all.
- Why pull-ups block the one thing your child needs, They wick away the very sensation that teaches the brain. The body-signal layer needs feedback to learn.
- How the Body-Signal Learning Layer works, A gentle sensation that lasts that gives the nervous system 30-60 seconds to register: something happened. That's the window most children never get.
- The 60-day guarantee, Try it. By your judgment. If it doesn't work for your child, full refund. No questions. No pressure.

If any of this sounds familiar, if your child doesn't seem to feel when they need to go, if pull-ups are the only thing that works but you know they're not teaching, if you've tried methods that assume a signal that just isn't there, then you know exactly why this approach is different.

---

### MIGRATION ANCHOR

If your child sounds like any of these descriptions, click here for a more detailed assessment.

[More Detailed Assessment →]

This short quiz helps us match your child's specific needs to the right approach, whether they're just starting to show signs or you've been at this for years. It takes two minutes.

---

### FINAL CTA

This the only offer we make:

1 Pair, $34.99, 60-Day Guarantee, No Pressure.

Start with a single pair. Add it alongside whatever you're currently doing. Pull-ups, underwear, bare-bottom, it doesn't matter. Just one pair that gives his nervous system the signal it's been missing.

[Start With 1 Pair, $34.99]

Or if you want the full approach:
[3+3 Bundle, $79.99, Free Shipping]

Why 3+3? Six pairs means you're never washing mid-week. Three days of wear, three in the laundry. At $79.99 with free shipping, that's $13.33 per pair, and they last through multiple children.

*That's $13.33 per pair with the bundle — less than half the single-pair price.*

---

### LENA SIGN-OFF

Whatever you choose, thanks for reading this far. If thisn't the day, that's okay. The product will be here next month. So will I.

I have two autistic sons. I know what it's like when "later" turns into another year. But I also know what it's like to push too early.

Trust your read.

With care,
Lena ——
Customer Support · Mom of two autistic sons

P.S. My older son was 8 before we figured this out. If you've stepped back from trying, I get it. 60 days, your judgment. No pressure. [link]

---

---

### SOURCE CITATIONS

| Claim | Source |
|-------|--------|
| Diminished body awareness in autistic children | Nicholson et al. (2019) — Journal of Autism and Developmental Disorders |
| 49% of autistic 4-5 year olds not toilet trained | Wiggins et al. (2022) — CDC-funded SPARK study, N=743 |
| Interoception as "eighth sensory system" | Mahler (2016) — The Interoception Curriculum |
| 59% cannot signal urination needs | Iqbal (2022) |
| Interoceptive differences in autism — 49-study review | Barmpagiannis & Baldimtsi (2025) |
| Pull-ups block body-signal learning | BrightKidCo mechanism research |
| Body-Signal Learning Layer — 30-60 second feedback window | BrightKidCo product engineering specs |
| 60-Day Guarantee | BrightKidCo policy — source: GIULIANO-DEMANDS.md §11.7 |
| GF segmentation rules — symptom language only, no diagnosis terms, migration anchor | GIULIANO-DEMANDS.md §1.2, V16 |
| E8 Section Structure — Hook → Recap → Final CTA → Lena Sign-Off | 2-full-email-copy-strategy.md §Welcome E8 |
| Lena Sign-Off LONG variant — "With care, Lena" | Layer-09-voice-lena.md §8.4 |
| Brand voice rules — V5, V7, V10, V12, V14 | Layer-09-voice-lena.md §4.1 |
| Forbidden phrases — "easy", "simple", "guaranteed", "fix" | Layer-09-voice-lena.md §5.1 |

---

# PART 2 — CREATIVE STRATEGY
